parameters.query:
SELECT c.id AS client_id, c.slug, c.name AS client_name, c.industry
FROM clients c
WHERE c.is_active = true
  AND c.slug IS NOT NULL AND c.industry IS NOT NULL

WITH
brain AS (
  SELECT bi.insights
  FROM brain_insights bi
  JOIN clients c ON c.slug = bi.client_id
  WHERE c.id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'
  ORDER BY bi.week_start DESC LIMIT 1
),
recent_plans AS (
  SELECT theme_name, theme_emoji, theme_direction, week_start
  FROM weekly_plans
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'
  ORDER BY week_start DESC LIMIT 6
),
existing_plan AS (
  SELECT id FROM weekly_plans
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'
    AND week_start = '{{ $json.week_start }}'::date
  LIMIT 1
),
inventory_summary AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE first_seen_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '45 days') AS aged_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE first_seen_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') AS new_arrivals,
    MIN(price) AS min_price,
    MAX(price) AS max_price,
    ROUND(AVG(price)::numeric, 0) AS avg_price
  FROM inventory_items
  WHERE client_id = '{{ $json.client_id }}' AND status = 'active'
),
approvers AS (
  SELECT p.id AS person_id, p.email, p.first_name, p.notification_preference
  FROM client_persons cp
  JOIN persons p ON cp.person_id = p.id
  WHERE cp.client_id = '{{ $json.client_id }}'
    AND cp.can_approve_plans = true
    AND cp.is_active = true
)
SELECT
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(brain)) FROM brain) AS brain,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(recent_plans)) FROM recent_plans) AS recent_plans,
  (SELECT row_to_json(inventory_summary) FROM inventory_summary) AS inventory_summary,
  (SELECT json_agg(row_to_json(approvers)) FROM approvers) AS approvers,
  (SELECT id FROM existing_plan) AS existing_plan_id

INSERT INTO weekly_plans (
  id, client_id, week_start, week_end, status,
  theme_name, theme_emoji, theme_direction,
  theme_seed,
  inventory_target,
  idea_ping_summary,
  created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  gen_random_uuid(),
  '{{ $json.client_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.week_start }}'::date,
  '{{ $json.week_end }}'::date,
  'idea_sent',
  '{{ $json._idea.theme.name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json._idea.theme.emoji }}',
  '{{ $json._idea.theme.direction.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json._idea.theme.theme_seed || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json._idea.inventory_target || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json._idea.idea_ping_summary || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW(), NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (client_id, week_start) DO UPDATE SET
  status = 'idea_sent',
  theme_name = EXCLUDED.theme_name,
  theme_emoji = EXCLUDED.theme_emoji,
  theme_direction = EXCLUDED.theme_direction,
  theme_seed = EXCLUDED.theme_seed,
  inventory_target = EXCLUDED.inventory_target,
  idea_ping_summary = EXCLUDED.idea_ping_summary,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, client_id, week_start

INSERT INTO idea_ping_responses (
  plan_id, client_id, auth_token, token_expires_at, created_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.plan_id }}'::uuid,
  '{{ $json.client_id }}',
  '{{ $json.auth_token }}',
  NOW() + INTERVAL '72 hours',
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id
